untranslatable_reason: The signal requires 'open-buy put-call ratio' and 'non-publicly observed option volume', which are not available in the allowed indicator set. These are derivatives market microstructure metrics not present in standard OHLCV data. vol_ratio_20 was used as a proxy for volume anomalies, but this does not faithfully represent the original put-call ratio logic.
translation_notes: Signal references option market microstructure (open-buy put-call ratio) that cannot be directly translated from equity price/volume indicators. The slope coefficient (-44) and t-statistic (-16.27) suggest strong negative relationship with next-day returns. Holding period is 1 day as specified. Without access to options volume data, this signal cannot be accurately implemented.
